description_long: This bungalow features a long, rectangular footprint with a gently sloped, gable roof extending over a full-length front porch supported by evenly spaced columns. The exterior is clad in a mix of beige and muted blue-green tones, creating a subtle, natural palette. The porch area is open and accessible, with the roof providing ample shelter and shade. The structure appears to be single-story, with no visible upper floors or dormers. The windows are arranged in a regular, linear pattern along the sides, contributing to a balanced and harmonious facade. The overall design is simple yet functional, evoking a classic, ranch-style bungalow suited for suburban or park-like urban settings.
description: A single-story, rectangular bungalow with a gable roof, full-length porch, and regularly spaced columns in beige and blue-green tones. The design is simple, functional, and balanced, with a linear window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gable roof, full-length porch, and two main entrance columns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended length of the bungalow, the row of columns, and the linear window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the gable roof and porch structure visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the long row of columns and windows along the facade.
